meaning: n.板条,狭板vt.用板条做或装备,打,猛投
examples: Boyan Slat has one huge goal.
The dream goes on for Slat.
Slat and his team are working to improve System 001/B.
Slat the brisket liberally then brown for 7 to 10 minutes on each side.
Inside the studio are wooden slat seats from the old Cleveland Municipal Stadium.
